chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Revision Application No. S- 89 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.02.2024. Mr. Athar Hussain Abro Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ferozeuddin No. Shaikh advocate for applicant under instructions does not press the instant Criminal Revision Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Irfan/PA
